note: The reject check exercises the whole AI-gateway inlet hermetically: route registration, Host→tenant resolution, the _llm self-gate, the bus round-trip, the guard rule's EMIT verdict, and Anthropic-shaped error rendering — no upstream, no secrets. Forwarding to a real upstream needs a network + key, so it stays a manual step (README.md).
